summary: M425 — Companion sim wiring + benchmark improvements. Companions now use _effectiveLevel scaling so a L20 Frost Wyrmling reads as 300 dmg vs the prior 8 dmg. Benchmark dummies now have armor=0 so the chart measures raw class output instead of armor penetration. Re-snapshot generated; Todo List updated with current outliers (Ranger +193%, Paladin -79% suggesting AI skill-priority bug). Todo List link added to docs nav menu (shared/nav-header.js).
